Description: User input passed directly to Prisma $queryRaw without parameterization
Auto-Fix: Yes – replace with Prisma parameterized query: prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ${userId}`
Warning Message: CRITICAL: SQL Injection risk — raw user input in DB query

Auto-Fix: Yes – wrap content with DOMPurify.sanitize() before setting innerHTML
Warning Message: CRITICAL: XSS risk — unsanitized HTML rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML

Description: Route Handler mutation (POST/PUT/DELETE) missing Origin/Host header validation
How To Check: grep -rn 'export async function POST\|export async function DELETE\|export async function PUT' app/api/ --include='*.ts'
Auto-Fix: Warning only – add Origin header check or migrate to Server Actions (CSRF protected by default)
Warning Message: HIGH: CSRF risk — Route Handler mutation may lack origin validation

Description: Route Handler returns raw error object or stack trace in response
Auto-Fix: Yes – wrap in apiError() helper and log with console.error
Warning Message: HIGH: Stack trace exposed in API response

Description: Route Handler missing explicit Content-Type (NextResponse.json handles this automatically — check for manual Response usage)
Auto-Fix: Yes – replace new Response() with NextResponse.json()
Warning Message: HIGH: Manual Response() may be missing Content-Type header

Description: Route Handler or Server Action accessible without auth check
How To Check: grep -rn 'export async function GET\|export async function POST' app/api/ -A5 --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'getServerSession\|auth()\|getToken'
Auto-Fix: Warning only – add auth guard: const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
Warning Message: HIGH: Unauthenticated access to sensitive route handler

Description: User can access/modify resources owned by other users (IDOR)
How To Check: Check Prisma queries for missing where: { userId: session.user.id } on user-scoped resources
Auto-Fix: Warning only – flag for manual review
Warning Message: HIGH: Possible IDOR — resource not scoped to current user

Description: File upload without MIME type validation or size limit
Auto-Fix: Warning only – add allowedTypes whitelist + maxSize check
Warning Message: HIGH: File upload missing validation — potential RCE or storage abuse

Description: Passwords or secrets hardcoded in source or committed .env
Warning Message: HIGH: Possible hardcoded secret in source code

Auto-Fix: Yes – validate against whitelist of allowed paths
Warning Message: MEDIUM: Open redirect — user-controlled redirect target

Description: Public API / login / comment route handler missing rate limiting
How To Check: Check app/api/auth/ and public mutation handlers for upstash/ratelimit or similar
Auto-Fix: Warning only – add rate limiting middleware or upstash/ratelimit
Warning Message: MEDIUM: No rate limiting on public/sensitive route handler

Description: Missing HTTP security headers (CSP / X-Frame-Options / HSTS etc.)
Auto-Fix: Yes – add headers in next.config.js headers() function
Warning Message: MEDIUM: Missing security headers in next.config.js

Description: File path built from user input without sanitization
Warning Message: MEDIUM: Directory traversal risk — user input in file path

Description: NODE_ENV=development or debug flags active in production
How To Check: Check .env.production: NODE_ENV=production / next.config.js for debug flags
Auto-Fix: Warning only – ensure NODE_ENV=production in deployment
Warning Message: LOW: Debug mode may be enabled in production

Description: Session/auth cookies missing Secure / HttpOnly / SameSite flags
How To Check: Check next-auth config: cookies option or inspect Set-Cookie header
Auto-Fix: Yes – set secure: true / httpOnly: true / sameSite: 'lax' in auth config
Warning Message: LOW: Auth cookie not hardened (missing Secure/HttpOnly/SameSite)

Description: Client-side code accesses secret env vars (NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix only for public vars)
Auto-Fix: Warning only – ensure secret vars are only used in server-side code
Warning Message: HIGH: Secret environment variable may be exposed to client bundle
